name: White Chocolate Mousse in an Almond Cookie Shell
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------MOUSSE-----------------------------------
1. In a separate bowl, combine 1 cup Sugar, 1 tablespoon Rum.
2. Add 1 liter of Water to the mixture and heat until it forms a soft ball.
3. Place 8 large Egg whites in the bowl of an electric mixer. Beat them to medium stiffness (start on medium speed, then increase to high).
4. Gradually add the sugar and water mixture from the saucepan to the egg whites, continuing to beat briefly until a stiff meringue forms.
5. In a separate metal bowl, beat 1 liter Egg yolks with heat until smooth.
6. Add Rum to the Egg yolks while still beating over heat.
7. Gently fold the Egg yolk mixture into the beaten Egg whites.
8. Gently incorporate the melted White Chocolate into the egg mixture.
9. Refrigerate for 3 to 4 hours before serving.
Serve one scoop of mousse in an almond cookie shell, garnished with Raspberry puree and Creme fraiche.
